2606.30291.title: PromptGNN-sim: Deep Fusion and Alignment of GNN and LLMs for Text-Attributed Graph Learning
2606.30291.paper_summary: Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs) combine textual semantics with graph structure and are central to many graph learning tasks. However, existing fusion methods often treat text and structure as separate inputs in a shallow, one-way pipeline, which limits deep interaction between modalities and weakens performance under sparse connectivity or cross-graph generalisation. To address this issue, we propose PromptGNN-sim, a bi-directional structure-semantic fusion framework for collaborative GNN-LLM learning. PromptGNN-sim uses a Graph Attention Network (GAT) for semantically aware neighborhood selection by combining structural attention with textual similarity. The selected structural context is then used to generate structure-aware prompts for an LLM, including the target node summary, label categories, and representative keywords from similar neighbors. During training, bi-directional cross-modal contrastive learning and cross-attention are introduced to jointly optimize the GNN and LLM components. Experiments on six public datasets, including Cora, Pubmed, and WikiCS, evaluate accuracy, generalisation, and robustness under cross-task transfer, cross-dataset generalisation, and sparse perturbations. Results show that PromptGNN-sim outperforms classical GNNs, LLMs, and recent GNN-LLM fusion methods, demonstrating the effectiveness of interactive structure-semantic collaboration for text-attributed graph learning.
2606.30291.paper_summary_zh: 文本屬性圖（TAGs）結合了文本語義與圖結構，對許多圖學習任務至關重要。<lb/>然而，現有的融合方法通常將文本和結構視為分開的輸入，採用淺層的單向管道，這限制了模態之間的深度互動，並在稀疏連接或跨圖泛化下削弱了性能。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了PromptGNN-sim，一種雙向結構-語義融合框架，用於協作GNN-LLM學習。<lb/>PromptGNN-sim使用圖注意力網絡（GAT）通過結合結構注意力和文本相似性來進行語義感知的鄰域選擇。<lb/>所選擇的結構上下文隨後用於為LLM生成結構感知的提示，包括目標節點摘要、標籤類別和來自相似鄰居的代表性關鍵詞。<lb/>在訓練過程中，引入了雙向跨模態對比學習和跨注意力，以共同優化GNN和LLM組件。<lb/>在六個公共數據集上進行的實驗，包括Cora、Pubmed和WikiCS，評估了準確性、泛化能力和在跨任務轉移、跨數據集泛化和稀疏擾動下的穩健性。<lb/>結果顯示，PromptGNN-sim超越了傳統的GNN、LLM和近期的GNN-LLM融合方法，證明了互動結構-語義協作在文本屬性圖學習中的有效性。
2606.30291.author: Zhifei Hu et.al.
